Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Relates to the effective date of a reclassification for an accidental disability retirement benefit
Summary: Relates to the effective date of a reclassification for an accidental disability retirement benefit for applications filed on or after January 1, 2027.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the retirement and social security law, in relation to the effective date of a reclassification for an accidental disability retirement benefit
